tasks.title: Initialize CLI project
tasks.notes: Created plug/ with package.json (ESM, type:module), bin/plug.js (shebang), src/index.js, .gitignore, LICENSE. npm install done. npm view plugvault confirmed name available (404). node plug/bin/plug.js --help works.

tasks.title: Set up Commander framework
tasks.notes: Wired Commander in src/index.js. Created 7 command files in src/commands/ (init, install, remove, list, search, update, vault). vault has 6 subcommands. All --help outputs verified.

tasks.title: Create registry repo structure
tasks.notes: Created plugvault/ with registry.json (2 entries: code-review command, api-patterns skill). Each has meta.json and .md entry file. registry.json parses correctly.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Scaffolding
tasks.notes: PASSED. plug --help shows all 7 subcommands. registry.json valid JSON with 2 packages. All .md files present. Pushed to origin.

tasks.title: Test infrastructure setup
tasks.notes: vitest already in devDependencies and test script already set. Created tests/smoke.test.js. npm test passes.

tasks.title: Constants and path utilities
tasks.notes: Created src/constants.js (all constants, OFFICIAL_VAULT, GitHub URL templates, CACHE_TTL_MS=1hr). Created src/utils/paths.js (getGlobalDir, getClaudeSkillsDir, getClaudeCommandsDir, getInstalledFilePath, getConfigFilePath, getCacheDir, ensureDir). 11 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Config and auth utilities
tasks.notes: Created src/utils/config.js (getConfig, saveConfig, getVault, getDefaultVault, getResolveOrder — with corrupt-backup and first-run seed). Created src/utils/auth.js (getAuthForVault with env->config chain, getAuthHeaders). 14 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Registry and fetcher utilities
tasks.notes: Created src/utils/registry.js (fetchRegistry with 1-hr TTL cache, getCachedRegistry, cacheRegistry, findPackage). Created src/utils/fetcher.js (downloadFile with auth, NETWORK_ERROR/AUTH_FAILED/NOT_FOUND error codes). 16 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Tracker utility
tasks.notes: Created src/utils/tracker.js (getInstalled, trackInstall, trackRemove, isInstalled — local and global scope, corrupt-backup on bad JSON). 9 unit tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Core Utilities
tasks.notes: PASSED. All 51 tests pass across 7 test files. All modules import cleanly: constants, paths, config, auth, registry, fetcher, tracker. No circular deps. Pushed to origin.

tasks.title: Implement plug init
tasks.notes: Creates .claude/skills/, .claude/commands/, .plugvault/installed.json. Skips existing. 3 tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement plug install — basic flow
tasks.notes: Parses name, resolves vault via findAllPackages(), downloads meta.json + entry file, routes by type, tracks in installed.json.

tasks.title: Implement plug install — advanced (conflicts, global, overwrite, auto-init)
tasks.notes: vault/name prefix, conflict prompt via select(), -g global flag, overwrite prompt via confirm(), auto-init if .claude/ missing. 11 tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement plug remove
tasks.notes: Checks installed.json, deletes file, removes from tracker, handles ENOENT gracefully. -g flag supported. 5 tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement plug list
tasks.notes: Reads local + global installed.json, formatted table output. --remote fetches all registries. --vault and --type filters. 7 tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Core Commands
tasks.notes: PASSED. 81 tests pass across 11 test files (up from 51). Full cycle tested: init → install → list → remove. All commands wired, registry schema bug fixed (findPackage now uses object-based packages lookup). Pushed to origin.

tasks.title: Implement vault add and vault remove
tasks.notes: vault.js: parseGithubUrl, checkConnectivity, runVaultAdd (URL validation, duplicate check, connectivity test, --token/--private flags), runVaultRemove (official guard, cache clear). Throws errors, Commander action wraps with process.exit(1).

tasks.title: Implement vault list, set-default, set-token
tasks.notes: runVaultList (table: name, URL, visibility, default, package count from cache), runVaultSetDefault (updates default_vault + moves to top of resolve_order), runVaultSetToken (updates config + connectivity test).

tasks.title: Implement vault sync
tasks.notes: runVaultSync: clears cache for each vault, re-fetches via native fetch with auth headers, caches fresh data, prints per-vault summary. Returns { synced, totalPackages, errors }.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Vault Management
tasks.notes: PASSED. 119 tests pass across 12 test files (38 new vault tests). Full vault lifecycle verified: add → list → set-default → set-token → sync → remove. parseGithubUrl, checkConnectivity, all 6 vault subcommands tested. Ready for PM review.

tasks.title: Implement plug search
tasks.notes: runSearch with scoring (exact name=40, partial name=30, description=20, tag=10), --vault and --type filters, multi-vault support, skips unavailable vaults. 15 tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement plug update
tasks.notes: compareSemver utility, runUpdate (single package: up-to-date, updated, not-installed, vault-unavailable), runUpdateAll (loops all installed, returns summary). re-downloads file on update. 14 tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Search & Update
tasks.notes: 148 tests passing, 0 failures. Commit 565478d pushed.

tasks.title: Add spinners and color output
tasks.notes: ui.js createSpinner (TTY-aware no-op in tests). Spinners in install (resolve+download), list (remote fetch), search (vault fetch), update (check+download), vault (connectivity+sync). All output chalk-colored: green success, red errors, yellow warnings, cyan info.

tasks.title: Error handling and edge cases
tasks.notes: NETWORK_ERROR in fetcher.js (ENOTFOUND/ECONNREFUSED). AUTH_FAILED in fetcher+registry (401/403) with set-token hint. NOT_FOUND (404). Corrupt config.json and installed.json: backup+reset. EACCES/EPERM in install+update+remove. remove non-existent exits 0. vault add duplicate exits 1. All patterns match PLAN spec.

tasks.title: Add global flags (--verbose, --json, --yes)
tasks.notes: context.js: ctx singleton + verbose(). index.js: --verbose/--json/--yes via preAction hook. All commands emit ctx.json JSON. install+update respect ctx.yes. verbose() logs to stderr. 19 new tests in context.test.js; total 172 tests passing.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Polish & Error Handling
tasks.notes: PASSED. 172 tests across 16 files. All 7 error classes match PLAN spec. Spinners on all network ops. --json/--verbose/--yes flags working. 0 regressions. Reviewed and approved.

tasks.title: CLI README and contributing guide
tasks.notes: Documentation complete, 172 tests passing.

tasks.title: Skill authoring guide and registry README
tasks.notes: Documentation complete, 172 tests passing.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Documentation
tasks.notes: Documentation complete, 172 tests passing.

tasks.title: Publish to npm and create GitHub release
